title: test: warning behaviour for unset/set `TARGETOS`,`TARGETARCH`,`TARGETPLATFORM`
body:
Test buildah's warning behaviors for unset or set `TARGETOS`, `TARGETARCH`, `TARGETPLATFORM` or `TARGETVARIANT` args when set or unset directly or indirectly by the user.

Adds missing test for: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4295

comments.body:
Thanks @edsantiago for the patch.

> Incidentally, is --os linux or --os linux/amd64 supposed to shutup the missing TARGETOS warning? Because it doesn't. I gave up trying to add tests for that.

`--os` doesn't do but `--platform` does, I think `--os` needs to be fixed, I'll open a new PR fixing `--os` and will also amend the test then.
